message:
fix(dolt): raise DefaultMaxConnections from 50 to 200 (hq-gjnx3)

50 was too low for multi-crew environments. Each bd process opens a pool
of 10 connections, and with 15+ concurrent processes plus CLOSE_WAIT
connections from leaked pools, the server hit the limit regularly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
